channel.title: Chart Breakers & Star Stories
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Did your favorite artist just break a record or a heart? The charts are screaming, and we have the inside story you won't hear anywhere else.
channel.description: The latest music trends, chart updates, and star stories from Billboard and beyond. Stay updated with the Pop Culture.

item.title: Megan Thee Stallion Breaks Down in Tears at ‘Moulin Rouge!’ After Klay Thompson Breakup
item.description:
[Intro music fades out]
Host: Welcome back to "Trending on Billboard". Today, we're talking about Megan Thee Stallion, who made headlines over the weekend with her emotional performance in Moulin Rouge! The Musical.
[Soft music plays in the background]
Host: On Saturday, April 25th, the 31-year-old rapper took the stage at the Tony Award-winning Broadway show in New York City, just hours after announcing her split from NBA star Klay Thompson. In fan-captured footage, Megan is seen tearing up during the curtain call, still in costume, as she receives a standing ovation.
[Short pause]
Host: The breakup comes amid cheating allegations, which Megan addressed on social media. She wrote, "Cheating, had me around your whole family playing house... got 'cold feet.'" Megan further explained in a statement, "Trust, fidelity, and respect are non-negotiable for me in a relationship, and when those values are compromised, there's no real path forward."
[Soft music continues]
Host: Megan and Klay started dating in summer 2025, and the couple made their red carpet debut in New York City that July. They seemed to be going strong, with Klay even naming his boat after her, "SS Stallion", last Thanksgiving.
[Short pause]
Host: But it looks like things have come to an end. Megan's focusing on herself and moving forward with peace and clarity. We'll be keeping an eye on this story and bringing you updates as more information comes out.
[Outro music starts]
Host: That's all for today. Thanks for tuning in to "Trending on Billboard". We'll be back with more news and updates soon.
